# ArticleStatus <kbd>Enum</kbd>

> Lifecycle status of a published article.
> 
> Content follows a linear publishing workflow:
> DRAFT → IN_REVIEW → PUBLISHED → ARCHIVED
> Articles can return from ARCHIVED to DRAFT for re-publishing.

**Defined in:** `enums.zmodel`

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>enums.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
enum ArticleStatus {
    DRAFT
    IN_REVIEW
    PUBLISHED
    ARCHIVED
}
```

</details>

<a id="values"></a>

## 🏷️ Values

> Possible values for this enumeration.

| Value | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `DRAFT` | Initial state. Only visible to the author and workspace admins. |
| `IN_REVIEW` | Submitted for editorial review. Locked from further edits by the author. |
| `PUBLISHED` | Live and publicly accessible (subject to workspace visibility settings). |
| `ARCHIVED` | Removed from public listings but still accessible via direct URL.
Can be moved back to DRAFT for revision. |
